186.name: Inside the Gatehouse
186.description: The gatehouse is not much more than a sturdy wooden box built to house several orcan guards, to be at hand if unwanted visitors attempt to enter the encampment. A wooden ladder built into the eastern wall climbs up to a second floor.

npcs.name: Stout, orcan guard
npcs.description: stands ready to defend his village from any outside incursions and will do so

187.name: Gatehouse - Second Floor
187.description: Exactly the same dimensions and material as its relative below, this floor has the added luxuries of several smaller mats, for the guards, and a nicer bed set further apart for the guard commander. Roughly carved dice are strewn on the floor where the off-duty orcs gamble away their pay. A stout, orcan guard jumps backwards and presses his attack home! Neptune drives forward and presses her attack home!

npcs.name: Stout, orcan guard
npcs.description: stands ready to defend his village from any outside incursions and will do so

185.name: Entrance to the Settlement
185.description: Hundreds of felled trees have had their trunks sharpened into brutal points to create the palisade defense that wraps around the outer perimeter of this orcan settlement. You stand in a break in the palisade, where a small wooden structure has been constructed to serve as a sort of gatehouse to protect the entrance.

npcs.name: Stout, orcan guard
npcs.description: stands ready to defend his village from any outside incursions and will do so

188.name: Gatehouse - Roof
188.description: Standing ontop of the wooden gatehouse, you are able to see over the palisade and onto the approaching pathway to the west and smoke curling over a multitude of huts to the east. The distinct lack of guard rails makes you uneasy as you stare at the vicious points of the palisade marching to the north and south.

npcs.name: Orcan archer
npcs.description: for anything that might threaten the clans territory.

189.name: Inside the Walls
189.description: Standing just inside the huge wooden palisades you are able to take in the settlement before you. Not organized in a grid like many of the other races' homes, the orcs of this tribe have built their home in a more sprawling fashion. Huts of various shapes and sizes lay haphazardly arrayed within the confines of the palisade, connected by beaten tracks which ultimately leads to a large dominant structure in the middle.

npcs.name: Orcan patrol
npcs.description: defend his charge from any intruders.

190.name: Along the Dirt Road
190.description: A wide dirt road cuts straight through the heart of the settlement and acts almost as a river coursing from one end to the other. Smaller tracks, like tributaries, branch off and lead to huts of various shapes and sizes. Some huts are marked with rough signs, indicating some purpose. Ganondwarf nods.

191.name: A Broad Path
191.description: A path only slightly more narrow than the main road branches off, hugging close to the wooden palisade here. In another city this may be the military district, where the guards live.

192.name: Warrior Hut
192.description: This small hut is one of many of its kind of this side of the settlement. Placed close to the entrance, those who dwell here can respond quickly if the clan is under attack. Furnished with a small mat, large enough for two, and a basic table and chairs placed near a small firepit, it appears not much different from other orcan homes.

npcs.name: Orcan patrol
npcs.description: defend his charge from any intruders.

193.name: A Broad Path
193.description: The path is rather broad here, almost as wide as the main road in the center of the settlement. More huts lay to the north, south and west - those to the north and south of considerable size, and to the east the path narrows as it continues on its way.

194.name: Home of Mourbek
194.description: Larger than the other soldiers' homes, this must be the home of one of the commanders. A grand postered bed in one corner appears to be of elven make and a plush rug furnishes the floor. Other looted, mismatched furniture makes up the rest of the room and a map is pinned up one a wall.

npcs.name: Mourbek the Bold
npcs.description: on the raids north against the mountain tribes, where he made a habit of leaving his shield behind and walking up to whoever held the largest weapon.

195.name: A Dirt Path
195.description: The narrow dirt path meanders through a rather sparse section of the settlement. Ragged stumps stand where the forest once marked this ground and was harvested. The Hut Owner's Association must not have a strict policy on curb appeal.

196.name: A Dirt Path
196.description: The beaten dirt of this path cuts a swath through the long grass and thin trees that have begun to regrow after the construction of this orcan home. To the north, the path feeds back into the main road and it, in turn, is fed by pathways leading to the west and east.

197.name: Along the Dirt Road
197.description: Small tracks continue to lead off to the north and south as well as into huts directly off the main road. To the east, a large squat structure appears to be the focal point of the entire settlement.

npcs.name: Hunting wolf
npcs.description: a great help to hunting all manner of prey.

npcs.name: Nourbek the Hunter
npcs.description: wiry for an orc, with a slim frame made hard by slender muscle.

198.name: Outside a Den
198.description: A large hut has been burrowed into the ground to look like a wolf's den, with a large stone slab angling across the top to act as the roof. A heady scent drifts from the light smoke that drifts out of the entrance, making your head spin.

npcs.name: Orcan patrol
npcs.description: defend his charge from any intruders.

199.name: Inside the Den
199.description: A dark den has been burrowed into the ground in the middle of the settlement to house wolves who choose to live among their orc allies. Brush and pine has been dragged in the cover the ground and small bones lay scattered around.

200.name: Inside the Den
200.description: No torches or lanterns to provide light in the depths of this burrowed hole in the earth. Soft dirt trickles down from the ceiling and young roots snake through the ground. Small depressions in the ground indicate sleeping places for some beasts.

npcs.name: Den mother, naliah
npcs.description: at you.  She may not be the strongest fighter but the strength of the wolves are in the pack and she is the mother.

201.name: Inside the Den
201.description: A small tunnel burrows its way back upwards to the surface and soft light flickering through indicate some sort of indoor environment on the other end.

202.name: Entrance to the Den
202.description: This room has been set aside to provide a connection between the local den and the central structure in the village. A tunnel has been burrowed into the earth, leading west and a small archway leads south into a larger chamber.

203.name: Entrance of the Chamber
203.description: High walls of packed mud and thatch supported by thick timber beams enclose this large circular chamber. Scattered brush on the floor leads past a deep fire pit dug into the earth in the center of the room where a blazing fire emits a thick column of smoke through an opening in the ceiling high above. You have lost 884 experience.

204.name: Back of the Chamber
204.description: Thick animal skins make up the primary decorating theme in this portion of the circular chamber. Rugs line the floor leading up to a large chair draped in cougar and deer skin. Several large skins cover the back wall. Samu drains Chief Gurkarl's life! Samu swings his blade at Chief Gurkarl's face. Chief Gurkarl drives forward and lands a blow on Samu.

npcs.name: Chief Gurkarl
npcs.description: you. He appears unimpressed, but his posture reminds of a spring, ready to

npcs.name: Saugrim, Daughter of Maugrim
npcs.description: irritating rabbit who has crossed her path. Golden eyes track your every movement and tight muscles ripple beneath a glossy grey coat.

205.name: Before the Large Structure
205.description: A large, squat structure looms imposingly to the east, marking the heart of the settlement. Following the primary decorating theme of the orcs, large spikes lance upwards, persumably for some purpose. A column of grey smoke spirals out from what must be a small opening in the roof.

206.name: The Hunter's Lodge - North
206.description: The back room of the Hunter's Lodge is separated from the rest by a narrow archway with a rabbit pelt curtain to act as a door. Similarly decorated from the southern room, this has the added accent of a large map of the surrounding forests covering the far wall.

npcs.name: Nourbek the Hunter
npcs.description: wiry for an orc, with a slim frame made hard by slender muscle.

207.name: The Hunter's Lodge
207.description: The meeting hall for the caste of hunters, responsible for providing the meat for the settlement, it is fairly larger than the average hut. Various pelts of all sorts lay spread out on the floor and gruesome trophies have been hung on the walls.

208.name: Along the Dirt Road
208.description: Several huts stand just off of the main road here, perhaps used for some communal purpose or indicating some unique importance. Small signs hang outside several of them, crudely marked or painted.
